item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays in direct decision-analysis mode and treats the three-week metric changes as signals requiring attribution before a logistics-vendor decision. It does not fire triage, does not frame the situation as repeated local repair pressure, and provides a practical framework covering segmentation, evidence strength, cost structure, staged options, pilot validation, and final decision criteria."}
